use_cases: Displays a 3D animated loading indicator while content loads
Provides visual feedback during asynchronous operations
Serves as a placeholder during data fetching
Adds visual interest to loading states
Enhances user experience during wait times
ai_summary: A 3D CSS box loader animation component featuring four animated cubes with multiple faces (front, right, top, back) that create a dynamic loading indicator. The component uses CSS transforms to create depth and perspective, providing an engaging visual feedback mechanism for loading states.
